metadata.description: Complete mapping of Indian Penal Code (1860) sections to Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (2023) equivalents

IPC-121.title: Waging, or attempting to wage war, or abetting waging of war, against the Government of India

IPC-122.title: Collecting arms, etc., with intention of waging war against Government of India

IPC-153.title: Promoting enmity between different groups on grounds of religion, race, place of birth, residence, language
IPC-153.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years or fine up to Rs 5000 or both

IPC-153A.title: Deliberate and malicious acts intended to outrage religious feelings
IPC-153A.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years or fine up to Rs 5000 or both

IPC-295.title: Injuring or defiling place of worship with intent to insult any religion
IPC-295.punishment: Imprisonment up to 2 years or fine up to Rs 1000 or both

IPC-302.title: Punishment for murder
IPC-302.note: Most serious personal crime - victim death from criminal act

IPC-304.title: Causing death by act endangering life or personal safety
IPC-304.punishment: Imprisonment up to 2 years or fine Rs 5000 or both

IPC-307.title: Attempt to murder
IPC-307.punishment: Life imprisonment or imprisonment up to 10 years + fine

IPC-308.title: Attempt to cause hurt
IPC-308.punishment: Imprisonment up to 6 months or fine Rs 250 or both

IPC-323.title: Punishment for voluntarily causing hurt
IPC-323.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 months or fine Rs 250 or both

IPC-324.title: Voluntarily causing hurt by means of weapon or anything used as weapon
IPC-324.punishment: Imprisonment up to 6 months or fine Rs 500 or both

IPC-337.title: Causing hurt by act endangering life or personal safety
IPC-337.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 months or fine Rs 250 or both

IPC-376.title: Punishment for rape
IPC-376.punishment: Imprisonment up to 7 years or fine Rs 5000 or both; in certain cases life imprisonment

IPC-379.title: Punishment for theft
IPC-379.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years or fine Rs 10000 or both

IPC-380.title: Theft in dwelling house, etc.
IPC-380.punishment: Imprisonment up to 7 years or fine Rs 10000 or both

IPC-392.title: Punishment for dacoity
IPC-392.punishment: Imprisonment up to 10 years or life imprisonment + fine

IPC-420.title: Cheating and dishonestly inducing delivery of property
IPC-420.punishment: Imprisonment up to 7 years or fine Rs 10000 or both

IPC-498A.title: Cruelty by husband or his relatives
IPC-498A.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years or fine Rs 10000 or both
